successful registration, participants submit their paper research or study on the Google form provided on the website before the event's due deadline. All such papers received will be evaluated by professors and the accepted or shortlisted

Following the presentations, participants will be further shortlisted based on their performance, and a viva will be conducted for the selected candidates.
Finally, the best performers and outstanding papers will be recognized with prizes and certificates.
